description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem two-terminal dc lines. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, rarray = a2trmdcreal(sid, ties, flag, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rarray = a2trmdcreal(sid, ties, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem two-terminal dc lines to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem two-terminal dc lines to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the two-terminal dc line quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for interior subsystem two-terminal dc lines only.
for subsystem tie two-terminal dc lines only.
for both interior subsystem two-terminal dc lines and tie two-terminal dc lines.

flag.description: for only in-service two-terminal dc lines.

string.description: dc line current in amps.
dc line resistance in ohms.
Desired current (in amps) or power (in MW) demand.
Scheduled compounded dc voltage in kV.
Mode switch dc voltage in kV.
Compounding resistance in ohms.
Margin in pu of desired dc power or current.
Minimum compounded dc voltage in kV.
ac current in amps at the rectifier.
ac current in amps at the inverter.
ac current in pu at the rectifier.
ac current in pu at the inverter.
Rectifier dc voltage in kV.
Inverter dc voltage in kV.
Rectifier converter angle in degrees.
Inverter converter angle in degrees.
Rectifier minimum steady-state converter angle in degrees.
Inverter minimum steady-state converter angle in degrees.
Rectifier nominal maximum converter angle in degrees.
Inverter nominal maximum converter angle in degrees.
Rectifier commutating transformer resistance per bridge in ohms.
Inverter commutating transformer resistance per bridge in ohms.
Rectifier commutating transformer reactance per bridge in ohms.
Inverter commutating transformer reactance per bridge in ohms.
Rectifier primary base ac voltage in kV.
Inverter primary base ac voltage in kV.
Rectifier transformer ratio in pu.
Inverter transformer ratio in pu.
Rectifier tap setting in pu.
Inverter tap setting in pu.
Rectifier maximum tap setting in pu.
Inverter maximum tap setting in pu.
Rectifier minimum tap setting in pu.
Inverter minimum tap setting in pu.
Rectifier tap step in pu.
Inverter tap step in pu.
Rectifier commutating capacitor reactance magnitude per bridge in pu.
Inverter commutating capacitor reactance magnitude per bridge in pu.
Acceleration factor for capacitor commutated converter solution.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the rectifier in MW.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the inverter in MW.
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the rectifier in Mvar.
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the inverter in Mvar.
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the rectifierin MVA.
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the inverter in MVA.
Active power losses in MW.
Reactive power losses in Mvar.
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the rectifier (units determined by power output options).
Apparent active power flow into the dc line at the inverter (units determined by power output options).
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the rectifier (units determined by power output options).
Apparent reactive power flow into the dc line at the inverter (units determined by power output options).
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the rectifier (units determined by power output options).
Apparent ac power flow into the dc line at the inverter (units determined by power output options).
Active power losses (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power losses (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
